🎙TUNE IN: I will be on Soundside with Libby Denkmann on @KUOW (94.9 FM) at 12pm and 8pm PT today to discuss my work fighting back against the Republican Rip-Off.

Thx to the thousands of folks from across #WA02 who tuned in to my telephone town hall this afternoon!

I was able to get to 18 of your questions, but if you have a question that didn’t get answered, contact my office at Rick.Larsen@mail.house.gov or at https://t.co/1IH7WJ84vg. https://t.co/v7uBIoN5La

Thank you to everyone who has asked a question during my telephone town hall so far!

📞 855-962-0954
💻 https://t.co/a5qbfQ0vGI https://t.co/oLw3gytLpU

⏰ Today, Saturday, February 15, 1:00 p.m PT

📞 855-962-0954

💻 https://t.co/a5qbfQ0vGI https://t.co/J2OGXIiEVh

I’ve heard from many of my constituents  who are fed up w/the Republican Rip-Off. This Admin is doing nothing to lower costs & create jobs for my constituents – they're only sewing confusion & chaos. Join me in fighting back against the Republican Rip-Off.

It's Round Two of the Republican Rip-Off! This time, Trump is empowering an unelected billionaire w/many conflicts of interest to put my constituents’ Social Security & Medicare benefits & data at risk & interfere with USAID, undermining natl security & U.S. global leadership.

I won’t stand for it. Join me in standing with working families to push back against the Republican Rip-Off.

Knowing there are so many good & effective ways to stop fentanyl, I guess the Trump tariff & tax increase is part of its scheme to find $ to pay for the GOP Rip-Off - a tax cut for the richest Americans & wealthiest corporations paid for by everyday Americans & small businesses.

The Trump tariff & tax increase is officially out & it looks like it will cost my constituents at least an extra $1,200 a year, according to one analysis. It will raise prices of food & energy everywhere, but who eats or uses cars to get around? Everyone!

The travelin…

I am currently reading Adam Higginbotham’s “Challenger,” which tells a compelling story of the crew members & the space program, the tragic disaster, & the ensuing investigation, which revealed how cost cutting & suppression of safety concerns led to tragedy 39 years ago today. https://t.co/gWKHbNmrVL

On January 28, 1986, the Space Shuttle Challenger broke apart 73 seconds after takeoff, killing all seven crew members on board. As a junior at Pacific Lutheran, I remember watching the horrible images of the disaster on TV - one of the most shocking moments of the 20th century. https://t.co/suPVJ7a3fm
This is what happens when you let AI write your Executive Orders.

RT @valerie_yurk: .@TransportDems ranking member @RepRickLarsen on the funding pause:

“Donald Trump’s indiscriminate and reckless spending…

Chaos & confusion is the point: the EO blocks funding to pay teachers, support first responders, provide mental health services & house homeless vets. It undermines progress to invest in roads, bridges, highways & other WA-02 infrastructure that create jobs & keeps the PNW moving

Why is the new Administration doing this? To pay for a massive tax cut for corporations & the wealthiest Americans. 

It’s time the Administration start caring about the working people I represent.
The new Administration’s illegal funding freeze chokes off virtually all federal funding for basic services – a reckless move that hurts jobs & raises prices on the working families I represent.
#NeverAgain
